'''Magwit's Mystifying Hoop''' was a short-range [[matter transmitter]] owned by the magician and illusionist [[Wim Magwit]].

==Description==
Magwit's Mystifying Hoop was an advanced [[matter transmitter]] that was comprised of several components. The main components were a pair of two-[[Meter/Legends|meter]] wide [[teleporter]] frames, one of which was circular, while the other was rectangular. A teleportation generator and a handheld controller unit were also part of the system. When something or someone passed through one of the frames, they were instantly transported to the other one by the teleportation generator.<ref name="EGWT" />

Each teleporter frame was insulated, and could be held and moved without difficulty. Thirty replaceable [[matter transmitter]]s were spaced evenly around the inner ring of the hoop, each mounted on a [[Power Transmitter Receptor]]. The method by which the teleportation generator moved matter between the two frames was unknown, but theories included breaking down the matter and transmitting it between the frames, or even moving the object through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. The power needs of the system were enormous, and the frames would drain their [[Power cell/Legends|power cells]] within a [[Standard minute/Legends|minute]]. The generator had the ability to transport an object moving through the frames a maximum range of fifty meters.<ref name="EGWT" />

==History==
[[File:MystifyingHoop.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Schematics of Magwit's Mystifying Hoop.]]
The hoop was originally owned by a [[Unidentified alien (Magwit's Mystifying Hoop)|strange alien]], whom [[Wim Magwit]] befriended. After observing the [[Alien/Legends|alien]] using the device and learning would to operate and repair it, Magwit stole the matter transmitter and established himself as a magician,<ref name="EGWT" /> with a traveling magic show that included his wife, [[Bellina Magwit|Bellina]], and their children. While a talented performer and magician, the hoop was the perennial favorite and highlight of [[Wim Magwit]]'s performances.<ref name="Bar-Kooda">''[[Boba Fett: Bounty on Bar-Kooda]]''</ref>

When [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] sought the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Bar-Kooda]], he enlisted the aid of Magwit who had previously been an unwilling member of Bar-Kooda's crew until he managed to escape. Magwit managed to perform a magic show for Bar-Kooda where the pirate travelled through the hoop, right into the Fett's clutches. While escaping Bar-Kooda's ship, ''[[Bloodstar]]'', Magwit was forced to abandon the hoop.<ref name="Bar-Kooda" />
